versions.version_description: It has no capo, and it's the way that Paramore's guitarist (Taylor York) plays it live and in studio.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
CAPO ON 4TH FRET

[ch]Fadd#11[/ch]   13320x

[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
When I was younger I saw my daddy cry and curse at the wind[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                                                [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
He broke his own heart and I watched as he tried to re-assemble it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                      [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
And my mama swore that she would never let herself forget[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
And that was the day that I promised I'd never sing of love[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
if it does not exist, but darling[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Maybe I know somewhere deep in my soul that love never lasts[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                         [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
And we've got to find other ways to make it alone or keep a straight face[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
And I've always lived like this, keeping a comfortable distance[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                              [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
And up until now I had sworn to myself that I'm content with loneliness[/tab]

Because none of it was ever worth the risk

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Well, you are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]

[Instrumental]
([ch]Am[/ch]) [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
I've got a tight grip on reality, but I can't[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Let go of what's in front of me here[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
I know you're leaving in the morning when you wake up[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Leave me with some kind of proof it's not a dream, whoa[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You are the only exception[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]    [ch]Fadd#11[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
And I'm on my way to believing[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fadd#11[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, and I'm on my way to believing[/tab]
